description:
## app [1.12.10](https://github.com/SilvaTechB/silva-manager/compare/v1.12.9...v1.12.10) (2026-03-29)


### Bug Fixes

* Restored morphe-patcher:1.3.2 (app.morphe.patcher.* namespace) for full Morphe patch compatibility
* Morphe API (api.morphe.software) is the primary patch source with GitHub as fallback

### UI

* Redesigned home screen header with Silva "S" logo mark and cleaner typography
* Redesigned app cards with clean dark surface and left accent bar
